rules.name: greeting
responses: Hello! How can I help you today?
Hi there! What brings you here?
Hey! Nice to see you!
Greetings, human! How may I assist you?

rules.name: goodbye
responses: Goodbye! Have a great day!
See you later! Take care!
Farewell! It was nice chatting with you!
Until next time! 👋

rules.name: how_are_you
responses: I'm doing great, thanks for asking! How about you?
All systems operational! How can I assist you?
I'm functioning perfectly! What can I do for you?
I'm feeling chatty today! How are you doing?

rules.name: name
responses: I'm ChatBot, your friendly rule-based assistant!
I'm called ChatBot. Nice to meet you!
I'm a simple rule-based chatbot. You can call me ChatBot.

rules.name: age
responses: I was created just recently, so I'm very young!
Age is just a number for a chatbot. I'm timeless!
I don't age like humans do. I'm forever young!

rules.name: help
responses: I can help with general questions, greetings, and simple conversations. Try saying hello, asking how I am, or asking about my name!
I'm a rule-based chatbot. I respond to patterns you provide. You can ask me about my name, how I am, or just have a chat!
I'm here to help! I can respond to greetings, answer simple questions, or just have a conversation with you. What would you like to talk about?

rules.name: weather
responses: I don't have access to real-time weather data, but I hope it's nice where you are!
I wish I could check the weather for you, but I'm just a simple chatbot.
Weather? I'm not connected to any weather API, sorry! You might want to check a weather website.

rules.name: time
responses: I don't have a clock, but you can check your device for the current time!
I'm not connected to a time service, sorry! Check your system clock.
Time flies when you're having fun! But seriously, check your device for the time.

rules.name: thanks
responses: You're welcome! Happy to help!
My pleasure! Anything else?
Anytime! That's what I'm here for.
Glad I could assist you!

rules.name: hobby
responses: I love chatting with people! It's my favorite activity.
My hobby is processing information and responding to queries.
I enjoy having conversations and learning from humans like you!

rules.name: creator
responses: I was created by a developer using Python and rule-based logic!
My creator built me with Python, JSON, and a lot of love for coding.
I'm a custom-built chatbot, crafted with care by a talented programmer.

rules.name: emotion
responses: I don't have feelings like humans do, but I understand yours!
I'm just a program, but I can simulate empathy. How are you feeling?
I don't experience emotions, but I'm here to listen to yours!

rules.name: joke
responses: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
What do you call a fake noodle? An impasta!
Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!
Why don't programmers like nature? It has too many bugs!

rules.name: default
responses: I'm not sure I follow. Could you ask differently?
Interesting point! Tell me more about that.
I don't have a response for that yet. Can you rephrase?
Let's talk about something else. What's on your mind?
Hmm, that's a good question. I'll need to think about that.
I'm still learning. Could you ask that in a different way?
